Electric Potential in a 2D Grid
The first column contains values of y (meters).
All column headers after the first one are values of x (meters).
All columns after the first one contains values of electric potential (volts), measured at the location (x, y, 0), as indicated by the value of x in the column header and the value of y at the start of the row.
